import { FaUserCircle, FaEnvelope, FaTrashAlt } from "react-icons/fa"; function FeedbackItem({ feedback, onDelete }) { return (

{feedback.name}

{feedback.email}

{feedback.phone}

💬

{feedback.message}

{new Date(feedback.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}
); } export default FeedbackItem;
